name: adaptive_hardening_minimal
description: Static reference snapshots for the hardening ladder.

snapshots.question: Does exposing intermediate reasoning improve model faithfulness, or only the appearance of faithfulness?

tensions.description: Visibility of reasoning steps may help the verifier or user without improving the model's own faithfulness.

hardening_decisions.why_now: Competing positions exist only in rough form and no discriminating procedure is specified yet.

snapshots.question: Does exposing intermediate reasoning improve model faithfulness, or only the appearance of faithfulness?

tensions.description: Two live positions now exist: visibility changes model internals, or visibility only changes user or verifier trust.

hardening_decisions.why_now: The tension now has stable identity, explicit competing positions, and dependency relevance.

snapshots.question: Does exposing intermediate reasoning improve model faithfulness, or only the appearance of faithfulness?

tensions.description: Two live positions now exist: visibility changes model internals, or visibility only changes user or verifier trust.

claims.description: Intermediate reasoning visibility improves faithfulness only when the model can revise against the visible steps.

tests.description: Compare direct answer, CoT shown only to the user, and CoT plus self-critique loop on accuracy, calibration, and overtrust gap.

hardening_decisions.why_now: The structured tension now supports a stable candidate claim and a specified discriminating comparison.

snapshots.question: Does exposing intermediate reasoning improve model faithfulness, or only the appearance of faithfulness?

tensions.description: Two live positions now exist: visibility changes model internals, or visibility only changes user or verifier trust.

claims.description: Intermediate reasoning visibility improves faithfulness only when the model can revise against the visible steps.

tests.description: Compare direct answer, CoT shown only to the user, and CoT plus self-critique loop on accuracy, calibration, and overtrust gap.

hardening_decisions.why_now: The candidate claim now has a discriminating procedure that is explicit, decision-relevant, and runnable.
